creator: ar@null.lv
text:
- Update to 0.13, some highlights:
  o Project session file support 
  o File Browser sidebar plugin, VCdiff plugin and Autosave plugin
  o Plugin Manager dialog to enable/disable plugins 
  o Configurable keybindings for Cut, Copy and Paste 
  o native GTK printing support on Unix-like systems
  o New translations: Japanese, Ukrainian and Greek, many updated
    translations
- Use GNU make
- Use GNU regex (gnu/regex.h, -lgnuregex)
- Taking maintainership (last time when I submitted PR to devel/geany,
  it got commited only after maintainer timeout - 2 months)
